'''√h-ng-m''' ('''hangama''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cuck|cuck]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-ng-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cuck|cuck]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √h-ng-m
|-
! Lemma
| hangama
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || hangamithi || hangamiji || hangamishi || hangami
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || hangamuthuth || hangamujuj || hangamushush || hangam
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || hangamuthu || hangamuju || hangamushu || hangamu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || hangamufuth || hangamufuj || hangamufush || hangamuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || hangamethe || hangameje || hangameshe || hangame
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || hangamothoth || hangamojoj || hangamoshosh || hangam
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || hangamotho || hangamojo || hangamosho || hangamo
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || hangamofoth || hangamofoj || hangamofosh || hangamof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || hangamïf || hangamïf || hangamïf || hangamïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || hangamïfïf || hangamïfïf || hangamïfïf || hangamïfïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || hangamïf || hangamïf || hangamïf || hangamïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || hangamïf || hangamïf || hangamïf || hangamïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || hangamæthæ || hangamæjæ || hangamæshæ || hangamæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || hangamathath || hangamajaj || hangamashash || hangam
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || hangamatha || hangamaja || hangamasha || hangama
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || hangamafath || hangamafaj || hangamafash || hangamaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || hangamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || gohangamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || gokihangamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || hangamnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || gohangamnknüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokihangamnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || hangamshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gohangamnkshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokihangamshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || hangamroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || gohangamnkroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokihangamroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || hangammuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || gohangamnkmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokihangammuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || hangamsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || gohangamnksherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokihangamsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || hangamngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || gohangamnkngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokihangamngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || hangamyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || gohangamnkyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokihangamyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || hangamyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || gohangamnkyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokihangamyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || hangamnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gohangamnknüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokihangamnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || hangamnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gohangamnknüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokihangamnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || hangamnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gohangamnknümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokihangamnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || hangamshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gohangamnkshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokihangamshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || hangamshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gohangamnkshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokihangamshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || hangamshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gohangamnkshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokihangamshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || hangamronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gohangamnkronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokihangamronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || hangamroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gohangamnkroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokihangamroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || hangamromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gohangamnkromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokihangamromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || hangammunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gohangamnkmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokihangammunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || hangammushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gohangamnkmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokihangammushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || hangammuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gohangamnkmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokihangammuroasha
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || hangam
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || hængæm
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || hohangam
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || hohængæm
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || hohohangam
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || hohohængæm
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || nühangam
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || nühængæm
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || nünühangam
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nünühængæm
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || nïhangam
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || nïhængæm
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïhangam
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïhængæm
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || luhangam
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || luhængæm
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || luluhangam
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || luluhængæm
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || lihangam
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || lihængæm
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || lilihangam
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || lilihængæm
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || kohangam
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || kohængæm
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || kokohangam
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kokohængæm
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || kehangam
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || kehængæm
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || kekehangam
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kekehængæm
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
